What action is the person wearing a white sleeveless top performing with the dough?
Describe the sequence of actions performed to prepare the mixture in the bowl.
canonical_answer: At 8s, white powder is poured into a clear glass bowl; at 10s, a hand sprinkles granular substance over flour and butter cubes; at 14s, hands mix dry powders with yellow liquid inside the bowl; at 16s, fingers press into the shaggy dough mixture; at 18s, the bowl is shaken to tumble the crumbly contents.

question: Have the pair of hands with fair skin started mixing the ingredients inside the clear glass mixing bowl?

What specific change happens to the ingredients in this segment? A. White powdery substance is poured into the clear glass mixing bowl. B. The shaggy, pale beige dough mixture is kneaded by hands. C. A bright yellow, glossy, spherical egg yolk is struck by a silver metal spoon. D. The pale yellow dough ball is wrapped in clear plastic wrap.

How has the bowl's contents changed from when ingredients were first added to the final state shown? A. From separate flour and butter cubes to a combined crumbly mixture B. From liquid batter to a smooth dough ball C. From empty bowl to only white flour powder D. From cooked dough to raw separated ingredients

Why is there a mound of white flour in the bowl in chunk 5? A. Text graphics reading 'BE A BETTER COOK' were displayed B. A ball of yellow dough appeared on the surface C. A white powdery substance was poured into the bowl D. A hand sprinkled a granular substance into the bowl
What happens to the crumbly mixture after it is mixed by hand in the glass bowl?
canonical_answer: The dough is kneaded on a white surface and then wrapped in clear plastic film.
